scenario.title: Scenario A - Stable Series Measurement
scenario.subtitle: Closed-loop wiring with a valid current path and consistent quantitative output.
scenario.lab_task: Verify Ohm's law in a single-loop DC circuit.
scenario.learning_objective: Understand closed circuits and ideal switch behavior.
scenario.presentation_summary: The learner assembled a valid loop and produced a stable current reading that supports conceptual explanation.
scenario.teacher_note: Use the switch and resistor voltage distribution to explain why ideal switches contribute almost no voltage drop.

circuit.name: 正常串联电路
circuit.description: 单电源、单开关、单电阻的最小闭环，用于展示基础 MNA 求解。

todo: TODO: 仅支持直流稳态两端器件网络。
TODO: 暂不支持受控源、交流分析、瞬态分析。

heuristic_hints: 当前电路结构正常，可以继续观察各节点电压和支路电流。
direct_fixes: 无需纠错，可尝试修改参数观察串并联规律。
teacher_actions: 教师可引导学生解释求解结果与欧姆定律的一致性。

presentation.system_judgement: The current circuit is structurally valid and the solver returns a stable DC operating point labeled as 'Closed Loop'.
presentation.pedagogical_interpretation: The scenario now supports a more conceptual discussion around understand closed circuits and ideal switch behavior. instead of basic troubleshooting.
presentation.recommended_next_step: Continue with conceptual coaching and ask the learner to explain the observed node voltages in their own words.
